The Problem

You know you need AI.
You don't have time to figure it out.

The Tooling Trap

You've tried ChatGPT.

It helps sometimes. But copy-pasting prompts into a chat window is not running your business. It's one conversation at a time, manually, by you. That's not a workforce — that's a better Google.

The Complexity Wall

Setting up real AI agents requires expertise.

Configuring multi-agent systems, building tool integrations, writing system prompts that actually work, connecting to your CRM, your email, your calendar — this is a full-time technical job. You're not a prompt engineer.

The Compounding Gap

Every week you wait, the gap widens.

Your competitors who figured out AI aren't just saving time — they're compounding it. While you're manually following up on leads, their AI already did it at 2am. While you're writing SOPs, their AI already documented everything.

We built FN3 because this problem has a clean answer.

The Solution

We build it. We configure it.
It runs your business.

Before FN3

You doing everything manually

  • Manually follow up with every lead
  • Write every piece of content yourself
  • Answer the same support questions daily
  • Build reports from scratch each week
  • Miss opportunities while you sleep
  • Hire more staff to scale
After FN3

Your AI workforce handling it

  • Sales agent nurtures leads automatically
  • Content agent runs your full calendar
  • Support agent resolves tickets 24/7
  • Ops agent generates reports instantly
  • Agents work while you sleep — and after
  • Scale with agents, not headcount
1
Step 01

We learn your business

1–2 days

A structured intake process — we map your workflows, understand your tools, audit your biggest time drains, and define exactly what each agent will own. This isn't a template. It's built around how you actually work.

Discovery callWorkflow mappingTool auditAgent scope definition
2
Step 02

We configure your AI workforce

2–3 days

We build each agent with custom system prompts trained on your business context, connect them to your existing tools, run QA testing across real scenarios, and configure handoffs between agents so the whole system works as one team.

Custom agent configurationTool integrations (CRM, email, Slack)Multi-agent workflow setupQA and testing
3
Step 03

Your agents start working

Monday morning

Monday morning, your AI workforce is live. They're in your inbox, your CRM, your Slack. They're following up on leads, resolving support tickets, generating reports — autonomously, while you focus on what only you can do.

Agents go liveReal-time activity dashboardWeekly performance reportsOngoing optimization
5-Day Deployment

How FN3 Deploys Your AI Workforce

From first call to live agents in 5 days. No long implementation projects, no consultants, no disruption to your team.

Day 1
01

Discovery Call

We map your highest-cost manual processes across 6 departments

A focused 60-minute session with your team. We identify where time is being lost, which tasks are most repetitive, and exactly which agents will deliver the fastest ROI for your business.

Days 2–3
02

Agent Design

We design custom agents for your workflows — no generic templates

Every agent is built around your actual processes, your tools, and your data. We configure workflows, connect integrations, and set up the logic that makes each agent genuinely useful for your team.

Days 4–5
03

Deployment

Agents go live in your existing tools: Slack, HubSpot, Gmail, Notion

No new software to learn. Agents plug directly into the tools your team already uses. We handle all the technical integration, test every workflow, and run live with your team before we hand anything over.

Week 2+
04

Optimization

Weekly monitoring, monthly performance reports, always-on support

We don't deploy and disappear. Every week we review agent performance, identify gaps, and push improvements. Monthly reports show you exactly what the agents did and what it saved you.

Most clients see their first time savings within 48 hours of deployment. Full ROI typically within 3–6 weeks.

Six Departments

Six departments. Forty-eight agents.
All configured for your business.

Click any department to see what your agents will actually do.

Results by Industry

Results across 6 industries

FN3 has deployed AI workforces across industries. These are the outcomes our clients reported.

E-commerce🛒
93%ticket reduction

Reduced customer service tickets from 340/week to 23/week. Manual review eliminated.

Law Firm⚖️
95%faster reviews

Contract review time cut from 4 hours to 12 minutes per document. 80% of standard contracts automated.

SaaS Startup🚀
3.4xpipeline growth

Lead qualification automated. SDR team refocused on $10K+ deals only. Pipeline grew 3.4x.

Marketing Agency📣
40%higher close rate

Proposal generation: 3 hours → 20 minutes. Close rate improved 40% with AI-personalized decks.

Healthcare Practice🏥
67%headcount savings

Scheduling, follow-ups, and billing comms fully automated. Front desk reduced from 3 FTEs to 1.

Real Estate🏠
47%more closings/agent

CMA reports automated. Listing descriptions generated in 90 seconds. 47% more listings closed per agent.

Case Studies

Real deployments. Real results.

C

Coastal Thread Co.

E-commerce · 12 employees
SalesMarketing
Plan
Growth
The Challenge

Coastal Thread was drowning in manual work — their team of 12 was spending 40+ hours a week on tasks that were clearly automatable: writing product descriptions, sending abandoned cart follow-ups, qualifying inbound wholesale leads, and building weekly performance reports. The founders knew AI could help but had zero bandwidth to figure out how.

The Outcome

After FN3 deployment, their Sales agent handles the entire wholesale inquiry pipeline — qualifying leads, sending proposals, and following up on a structured cadence. Their Marketing agent executes the full content calendar, manages email sequences, and optimizes product listings. The result: 40 hours a week reclaimed, $18K/month in pipeline automation, and their first $1M quarter.

"We were skeptical because we'd tried other AI tools and always ended up back to manual. FN3 actually deployed a system that runs without us touching it."

— Marcus R., Co-founder
Results at a Glance
40 hrs/week
Reclaimed
$18K/mo
Pipeline automated
3.2x
Faster lead response
Time to ROI
6 weeks
P

Prentice & Hollis LLP

Law Firm · 8 people
LegalSupport
Plan
Starter
The Challenge

A boutique law firm spending 60% of attorney time on contract review, client onboarding paperwork, compliance calendar management, and repetitive client communications. Partners were doing admin. Associates were doing what paralegals should do. The whole leverage model was broken.

The Outcome

FN3 deployed a Legal department agent handling first-pass contract review with risk flagging and redline suggestions, plus a Support agent managing all client intake, status updates, and standard communications. Contract review time dropped 80%. Zero compliance issues in 6 months. Partners reclaimed 12 hours a week each for billable work.

"The contract review agent catches things my associates miss — not because they're bad, but because they're reading the 40th NDA of the month. The agent is always fresh."

— Sarah P., Managing Partner
Results at a Glance
80%
Faster contract review
0
Compliance issues (6 mo)
12 hrs/wk
Reclaimed per partner
Time to ROI
4 weeks
S

Stackify (SaaS)

B2B SaaS · 5 people
SupportOperations
Plan
Starter
The Challenge

A 5-person SaaS startup with 800 active customers and no full-time support person. The founders were personally handling tickets, which meant support quality was inconsistent — sometimes instant, sometimes 48 hours late. They were also drowning in repetitive operational work: onboarding emails, usage reports, churn alerts.

The Outcome

FN3 deployed a Support team that handles all Tier 1 tickets without human touch, automatically escalates complex issues, and runs proactive check-in campaigns for at-risk accounts. The Ops agent manages onboarding sequences, generates weekly usage reports, and monitors churn indicators. Result: 94% of tickets resolved without human involvement, and they've maintained a 4.9-star rating through 3x growth.

"We went from personally answering support tickets at midnight to not thinking about support at all. The agents handle it and escalate the rare things that genuinely need us."

— Dev K., CEO & Co-founder
Results at a Glance
94%
Tickets resolved auto
4.9 ★
Rating maintained
3x growth
With same team size
Time to ROI
3 weeks

FAQ

Everything you want to know

If you have a question not listed here, you can ask it in your application.

From signed agreement to live agents: 5 business days. Day 1–2 is discovery and intake (we map your workflows and tools). Days 3–4 is configuration and integration setup. Day 5 is QA testing. Monday morning, your agents are live. For Enterprise plans with complex integrations, allow up to 7 days.

Still have questions?

Include them in your application. We review every one personally.
